message:
test(conformance): parity packet fixtures for title/regex/split-get/loc/iloc/head/isna edge cases

Adds 26 new strict-mode pandas-parity conformance packets covering
edges that fell out of the current coverage matrix. Organised roughly
by API family.

Series.str titlecasing (196)
- FP-P2D-196: digit-boundary (`"9lives" → "9Lives"`) and
  punctuation-boundary (`"rock'n'roll" → "Rock'N'Roll"`) cases that
  motivated the cased-run rewrite in the preceding commit.

Regex matching (218/219)
- FP-P2D-218: fullmatch vs partial — anchored pattern succeeds on
  whole-string match, partial match returns False.
- FP-P2D-219: match only anchors at start, so a mid-string hit
  returns False while a prefix hit returns True.

split/get/join with empty segments (222/223/255)
- FP-P2D-222 split_get_empty_segments: `"a,,b"` split on `","` and
  get(1) returns the empty segment, not missing.
- FP-P2D-223 join_empty_segments: `["a", "", "b"]` joined by `"-"`
  emits `"a--b"`, preserving the empty positions.
- FP-P2D-255 split_regex_get_empty_segment / trailing_empty_segment:
  regex split keeps empty segments on both sides of adjacent
  delimiters and on a trailing delimiter; get(-1) on the trailing
  case returns empty string.

Count / findall / contains / startswith / endswith (256–261)
- FP-P2D-256 count_matches_multiple_hits: regex count returns match
  count, not 0/1.
- FP-P2D-257 count_literal_empty_pattern / multiple_hits: empty
  pattern count equals len + 1 (pandas' Python behavior); literal
  multi-hit case confirmed.
- FP-P2D-258 findall_multiple_hits: each match yielded as its own
  list element.
- FP-P2D-259–261 contains_any / startswith_any / endswith_any with
  empty pattern: all-True for contains/startswith/endswith when the
  pattern list contains "", preserving pandas' short-circuit.

loc / iloc label & position errors (262/263)
- FP-P2D-262 loc_duplicate_request_order: duplicate labels in the
  selector preserve request order.
- FP-P2D-262 loc_missing_label_error: missing label raises
  KeyError-equivalent in strict mode.
- FP-P2D-263 iloc_negative_out_of_bounds / iloc_negative_positions:
  -1 indexes the last element, -len..-1 valid, -(len+1) raises
  IndexError.

head with edge sizes (275)
- FP-P2D-275 head_negative_n_saturates_empty: pandas interprets
  negative n as "all but the last |n|", saturating at empty when
  |n| >= len.
- FP-P2D-275 head_zero_n: n=0 returns an empty series with preserved
  index name and dtype.

isna / notna / isnull / notnull on NaN and empty UTF-8 (284–287)
- FP-P2D-284 isna_nan_empty_utf8: NaN and `""` inputs both evaluated,
  pinning that `""` is not NaN.
- FP-P2D-285 notna_nan_empty_utf8: inverse of 284.
- FP-P2D-286 isnull_nan_empty_utf8 / FP-P2D-287 notnull_nan_empty_utf8:
  same assertions under the pandas aliases to guarantee the is/isnull
  pair always agrees.

New expandtabs tabstops packet (250)
- FP-P2D-250 expandtabs_tabstops: multi-tab input exercising the
  column-aware padding introduced in the preceding commit (verifies
  tab stops align to multiples of tabsize regardless of where the
  tabs appear in the string).

All fixtures follow the established strict-mode packet format and
plug into fp-conformance without any runner changes.
